params.name: onBehalfOfContentOwner
params.description: The content owner's external ID on which behalf the user is acting on.

params.name: includeSystemManaged
params.description: If set to true, also returns system-managed reporting jobs.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: A token identifying a page of results to return.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: The maximum number of items to return in the response.

items.docs: Lists all reporting jobs that have been scheduled for the channel or content owner.

params.name: onBehalfOfContentOwner
params.description: The content owner's external ID on which behalf the user is acting on.

items.docs: Creates a reporting job. YouTube then begins generating daily reports for the specified report type. Reports are typically available within 24 hours of being generated.

params.name: jobId
params.description: The ID of the job to retrieve.

params.name: onBehalfOfContentOwner
params.description: The content owner's external ID on which behalf the user is acting on.

items.docs: Gets the metadata for a specific reporting job.

params.name: jobId
params.description: The ID of the job to delete.

params.name: onBehalfOfContentOwner
params.description: The content owner's external ID on which behalf the user is acting on.

items.docs: Deletes a reporting job. After deletion, YouTube stops generating reports for this job.

params.name: jobId
params.description: The ID of the job whose reports are being listed.

params.name: onBehalfOfContentOwner
params.description: The content owner's external ID on which behalf the user is acting on.

params.name: createdAfter
params.description: If specified, only reports created after the specified date/time are returned.

params.name: startTimeAtOrAfter
params.description: If specified, only reports covering data on or after this date are returned.

params.name: startTimeBefore
params.description: If specified, only reports covering data before this date are returned.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: A token identifying a page of results to return.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: The maximum number of items to return in the response.

items.docs: Lists reports created by a specific reporting job. Each report covers a 24-hour period and includes a download URL for retrieving the report data.

params.name: jobId
params.description: The ID of the job that created the report.

params.name: reportId
params.description: The ID of the report to retrieve.

params.name: onBehalfOfContentOwner
params.description: The content owner's external ID on which behalf the user is acting on.

items.docs: Gets the metadata for a specific report including its download URL.

params.name: onBehalfOfContentOwner
params.description: The content owner's external ID on which behalf the user is acting on.

params.name: includeSystemManaged
params.description: If set to true, also returns system-managed report types.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: A token identifying a page of results to return.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: The maximum number of items to return in the response.

items.docs: Lists report types that the channel or content owner can retrieve. Each report type defines the dimensions and metrics available in the generated reports.
